name: Incorrect Operator
description: The wrong quantum gate or operator is applied to a qubit, including incorrect rotation angles, wrong gate type (e.g., X vs. Z), or misapplied phase operations.
examples: Applying RY(90) degrees instead of RY(pi/2) radians.
Using X gate where Z gate is needed.
Phase gate with incorrect angle parameter.
Bugs-QCP: Flaky Test, Misconfiguration, Misconfiguration - Testing

name: Incorrect Qubit Mapping
description: A gate references the wrong qubit index, the same qubit as both control and target, or qubits that are out of range for the circuit.
examples: Swapped control and target in CX gate.
Bugs-QCP: Overlooked Qubit Order, Incorrect Application Logic

name: Missing Barrier
description: A barrier instruction is absent where it is needed to prevent circuit optimisers from reordering or cancelling gates that are semantically ordered by the algorithm.
examples: No barrier between state preparation and measurement.
Optimiser cancels H–H pair due to missing barrier.

name: Wrong Initial State
description: The quantum register is initialised to an incorrect state, either through a wrong state vector, wrong number of qubits, or incorrect use of the initialise() API.
examples: initialize() called with a 2-element vector on a 2-qubit register.
Missing reset before re-use of ancilla qubit.

name: Measurement Error
description: The measurement operation is incorrectly placed, targets the wrong qubit or classical bit, is missing entirely, or is performed with an incompatible backend.
examples: Classical register conditioned on before any measurement.

name: No Bug Detected
description: The static baseline found no matching heuristic patterns. The code may be correct, or the bug may be outside the scope of the implemented rules.

name: Unknown
description: The bug could not be assigned to a known taxonomy class. Used as a fallback when the LLM or baseline is uncertain.
examples: Bugs-QCP: Incorrect Application Logic, Overlooked Corner Case
Bugs-QCP: Overlooked Corner Case, Misconfiguration, Misconfiguration - Testing
Bugs-QCP: Wrong Concept, Overlooked Corner Case
